current_truth: Prime outbound queue and MCP draft processing have silent-failure and idempotency gaps that can hide or duplicate operator drafts.
next_scope_now: Implement strict validation, fail-closed controls, deterministic idempotency, and coverage for error paths.
adjacent_later: Add dashboard alerts for stuck processing states
Add end-to-end synthetic probe for outbound draft lifecycle
evidence_refs: operator-stated: walk through prime processes and identify silent failures/validation gaps
why: The outbound path can silently drop workflow labels, duplicate drafts, and leave processing states stuck, which directly affects guest communication reliability and operator visibility.

intended_outcome.statement: Prime outbound messaging and draft orchestration fail closed, are idempotent on retries, and expose deterministic failure states with regression coverage.
